note: Factual academic news; each item carries source + date. Auto-discovered items enter as pull requests (medium confidence); only verified items publish.

items.headline: New IWSLT 2026 paper on low-resource cascaded speech translation
items.summary: A paper by Pournima Sonawane and Haithem Afli was published at IWSLT 2026. The work examines robust cascaded speech translation for Bhojpuri–Hindi and Irish–English, combining Whisper-based ASR with NLLB-200 translation and evaluating routing strategies for low-resource pairs.

items.headline: PTEB accepted at EACL 2026
items.summary: Manuel Frank and Haithem Afli published PTEB, a dynamic text-embedding evaluation protocol using stochastic paraphrasing at evaluation time, at EACL 2026 (Long Papers).

items.headline: Two papers in Findings of EMNLP 2025
items.summary: The HAI group contributed GASE (generative augmentation for sentence encoding) and a study on signer dependence in sign language translation evaluation to Findings of EMNLP 2025.
